steps.text: You need to create a file called "/app/solution.txt" with the word found in "secret_file.txt" in the "secrets.7z" archive.

Initiating Data Extraction: I'm currently focused on extracting the "secrets.7z" archive, which is located in the "/app/" directory, so I can access the "secret_file.txt" contained within it. The key is to get the word I need to write to the specified output file. I'm starting by identifying the right tool to extract the archive.
steps.observation:

toolCalls.name: run_shell_command
toolCalls.args: {"description": "Extract the secrets.7z archive using bsdtar", "command": "bsdtar xf /app/secrets.7z -C /app"}

toolCalls.args: {"command": "apt-get update && apt-get install -y p7zip-full", "description": "Install p7zip to extract the 7z archive"}
